plan_metrics.plan_content:
## Analysis Complete

### The Bug

**File:** `src/utils.ts`, `processItems` function

```typescript
// ❌ BUGGY — stops one short of the last element
for (let i = 0; i < items.length - 1; i++) {
```

The loop condition `i < items.length - 1` is the culprit. For an array of 3 elements (indices 0, 1, 2), the loop only runs for indices 0 and 1 — index 2 (the last item) is never reached.

### The Fix

**One character change** — remove the `- 1`:

```typescript
// ✅ FIXED — processes every element including the last
for (let i = 0; i < items.length; i++) {
```

### Test Impact

The existing test suite in `tests/utils.test.ts` already covers this bug with 4 tests for `processItems`. Multiple tests are currently failing and will all pass after the fix — no new tests needed.
